mapper.sql: e.id, e.user_id, u.full_name AS employee_name, e.employee_no, e.department_id, d.name AS department_name, e.position, e.job_title, e.employment_type, e.hire_date, e.resignation_date, e.status, e.phone, e.email, e.emergency_contact, e.emergency_phone, e.bank_name, e.bank_account, e.annual_leave_days, e.memo, e.leave_start_date, e.leave_end_date, e.birth_date, e.created_by, e.created_at, e.updated_at
FROM erp_employees e LEFT JOIN erp_departments d ON e.department_id = d.id LEFT JOIN users u ON e.user_id = u.id

where.if: AND ( e.employee_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') OR u.full_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') )

mapper.select: SELECT employee_no FROM erp_employees WHERE employee_no LIKE CONCAT(#{pattern}, '%') ORDER BY employee_no DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO erp_employees ( id, user_id, employee_no, department_id, position, job_title, employment_type, hire_date, resignation_date, status, phone, email, emergency_contact, emergency_phone, bank_name, bank_account, annual_leave_days, memo, leave_start_date, leave_end_date, birth_date, created_by, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{id}::uuid, #{userId}::uuid, #{employeeNo}, #{departmentId}::uuid, #{position}, #{jobTitle}, #{employmentType}, #{hireDate}::date, #{resignationDate}::date, #{status}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{emergencyContact}, #{emergencyPhone}, #{bankName}, #{bankAccount}, #{annualLeaveDays}, #{memo}, #{leaveStartDate}::date, #{leaveEndDate}::date, #{birthDate}::date, #{createdBy}::uuid, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE erp_employees SET department_id = #{departmentId}::uuid, position = #{position}, job_title = #{jobTitle}, employment_type = #{employmentType}, hire_date = #{hireDate}::date, resignation_date = #{resignationDate}::date, status = #{status}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, emergency_contact = #{emergencyContact}, emergency_phone = #{emergencyPhone}, bank_name = #{bankName}, bank_account = #{bankAccount}, annual_leave_days = #{annualLeaveDays}, memo = #{memo}, leave_start_date = #{leaveStartDate}::date, leave_end_date = #{leaveEndDate}::date, birth_date = #{birthDate}::date, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}::uuid
UPDATE erp_employees SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}::uuid
